ddt:Target.Name: DW30_C1A_29bits_V1.7
ddt:Target.Description:
v1,7 -added screen GTA -coding correction for DID $2212: definition update from 12 to 19bytes -Auto Ident update with 3100_982 Vdiag $28 &$29 -Added specific req ''RoutineControl'' to fulfill DAI req -All ''$31'' requests were renamed with ''RoutineControl'' at the begining of the name in order to fulfill DAI req
v1.6
Added W requests 2E222801/2E2222803 - Green Clutch Green Clutch screen created Added XJL in the applicability list Added 3100_979 (Vdiag$28 &$29) Added 3100_980 (Vdiag$28 &$29) Added 3100_981 (Vdiag$28 &$29)
In order to comply with V1.10 checker rules, the below updates were made without any functional impact: -req 1103 /1101: response shorted from 6-->2bytes -req 2F000000 : only the mask response extended from 3 to 6bytes -DID$F121: dimesion increased 10-->20bytes -the lenght of the mask was updated 4bytes-->5bytes for the below responses: 71020402-->7102040200 71010401-->[...] 71010404 71020410 71020401 71010411 71020411 71010412 71020412 71030412 71010413 71020413 71010414 71020414 71030414 71010415 71020415 71010416 71020416 71010403 71020417 71010417 71010410-->[...]
============================================================================== V1.5
Added DTC $0613 to solve issue unknown DTC
Author: R.DIMOV
V1.4
Added DIDs for Daimler(F111 and F121) Added Configuration screen for DIDs on Euro6 D-Full applications
Author: R.DIMOV
BVA DW30 TCU
Software version : 960 and after (DiagOnCAN) Vehicle : XFC, HFE, XFD, XFB, XFA ,XFF, AS1, BJA January 2018 Authors : J MALET, I.EL MRABET

Data.Name: dsm_dtd_wrn_flg_dat
Data.Comment: drag torque warning flag restored from eeprom

Item.Text: routine aborted due to an error
routine aborted due to an error

Data.Name: speed sensor input shaft 1 supply voltage
speed sensor input shaft 2 supply voltage
transmission range sensor park lock position
voltage of paddle up shift signal
voltage of paddle down shift signal
counter for reverse gear engagement errors
Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured
Failure lights status
Data.Comment: Bit 0: MIL Request; Bit 1: check warning; Bit 2: Temperature warning

Item.Text: OccurrenceCounter (Counts the number of times the DTC have been set.)
OccurrenceCounter (Counts the number of times the DTC have been set.)
OccurrenceCounter (Counts the number of times the DTC have been set.)
Maximum clutch capacity reached but target engine torque could not be adjusted
Touch point eol flag is invalid
Feedback controller limits out of range
Output stages off by HW protection
Clutch not open leads to time out
Determined Max travel is too long
Determined Max. travels are too different
Determined Max. travel is too short
Insufficient reaction on Input shaft speed
Input shaft speed gradient too high
Clutch not closed leads to timeout
Value in service data too low
Value in service data too high
System not in normal operation mode

Data.Name: Test not completed since last clear
Test not completed this monitoring cycle

Item.Text: Clutch 1 component or system over temperature
Clutch 2 component or system over temperature
Clutch cooling motor sensor signal performance incorrect operation
Clutch cooling motor sensor supply voltage out of range
Clutch cooling motor sensor supply voltage SCB
Clutch cooling motor sensor supply voltage SCG
Clutch cooling motor speed too high
Clutch cooling motor speed too low
Clutch cooling motor speed zero or negative
Clutch motor 1 sensor signal performance or incorrect operation
Clutch motor 1 sensor supply voltage out of range
Clutch motor 1 sensor supply voltage SCB
Clutch motor 1 sensor supply voltage SCG
Clutch motor 2 sensor signal performance or incorrect operation
Clutch motor 2 sensor supply voltage out of range
Clutch motor 2 sensor supply voltage SCB
Clutch motor 2 sensor supply voltage SCG
Clutch system over temperature warning level 1
Clutch system over temperature warning level 2
Gearbox part 1 shift drum endstop position
Gearbox part 1 shift drum unexpected standstill
Gearbox part 2 shift drum endstop position
Gearbox part 2 shift drum unexpected standstill
Input shaft speed sensor 1 signal not plausible
Input shaft speed sensor 1 supply out of range
Input shaft speed sensor 1 supply voltage SCB
Input shaft speed sensor 1 supply voltage SCG
Input shaft speed sensor 2 signal not plausible
Input shaft speed sensor 2 supply voltage out of r
Input shaft speed sensor 2 supply voltage SCB
Input shaft speed sensor 2 supply voltage SCG
I-Shifter stuck button detection for P button
level 2 reset - SZ1 unwanted engine torque increase
level 2 reset - SZ14 P not engaged
level 2 reset - SZ19a P incorrect displayed
level 2 reset - SZ19b D/R incorrect displayed
level 2 reset - SZ19c N/P incorrect displayed
level 2 reset - SZ2 wrong dir launch
level 2 reset - SZ3 shift r while driving
level 2 reset - SZ6a downshift not allowed
Oil sump temperature sensor short circuit to battery or open circuit
Oil sump temperature sensor short circuit to ground
Oil sump temperature sensor signal not plausible
Shift drum 1 reference drive performance or incorrect operation
Shift drum 2 reference drive performance or incorrect operation
Shift motor 1 sensor supply voltage out of range R
Shift motor 1 sensor supply voltage SCB
Shift motor 1 sensor supply voltage SCG
Shift motor 2 sensor supply voltage out of range R
Shift motor 2 sensor supply voltage SCB
Shift motor 2 sensor supply voltage SCG
Shift paddle down shift signal SCG
Shift paddle up shift signal SCG
Shiftlever input signal P and Not P plausibility
TCU high power supply voltage out of range 1
TCU high power supply voltage out of range 2
TCU low power supply voltage above threshold
TCU low power supply voltage below threshold
Transmission pressure sensor 1 pressure too high
Transmission pressure sensor 1 pressure too low
Transmission pressure sensor 1 SCB or OC
Transmission pressure sensor 1 signal voltage below threshold
Transmission pressure sensor 1 supply voltage out range
Transmission pressure sensor 1 supply voltage SCB
Transmission pressure sensor 1 supply voltage SCG
Transmission pressure sensor 2 pressure too high
Transmission pressure sensor 2 pressure too low
Transmission pressure sensor 2 SCG or OC
Transmission pressure sensor 2 signal voltage below threshold
Transmission pressure sensor 2 supply voltage out range
Transmission pressure sensor 2 supply voltage SCB
Transmission pressure sensor 2 supply voltage SCG
Transmission range sensor signal compare failure
Transmission range sensor supply voltage out of range
Transmission range sensor supply voltage SCB
Transmission range sensor supply voltage SCG
Transmission range sensor teach-in not successful
Voltage level monitoring I-Shifter park LED
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
No Bus Signal / Message Specific SubType
Circuit Short to Ground or Open
Circuit Short to Battery or Open
Current Flow Below a Specified Range
Current Flow Above a Specified Range
Circuit Resistance Below a Specified Range
Circuit Resistance Above a Specified Range
Electrical Conditions detected during a few moment
Signal Amplitude Below a Specified Range
Signal Amplitude Above a Specified Range
Signal remains Low when Transitions are Expected
Signal remains High when Transitions are Expected
Improper Signal Shape (plot of Amplitude with Respect to Time)
Circuit which is Superimposed a Signal Voltage
Low Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
Low Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
High Pulse is too Narrow with Respect to Time
High Pulse is too Wide with Respect to Time
Incorrect Number of Cycles in a Given Time Period
Mismatch between Hardware Connected and Hardware Expected
Internal Temperature Above a Specified Range
Some Part of the Program has not been Enabled
Some Part of the Program has been Disabled
Need to Program Sub System (or Vehicle) Option Content
Two (or More) Input Parameters compared for Plausibility
Function actived for Greater than a Specified Time Period
Fewer Transitions than a Specified Number
More Transitions than a Specified Number
Correct Change of parameter(s) in Response to a Particular Event has not been detected
Detection of a System Event that was not caused by System itself
No Motion Detected in response to Energizing the Component
No Motion Detected in response to Closing the Component
No Motion Detected in response to Opening the Component
Excessive Duration in response to Energizing the Component
Unable to Move the Component to the Emergency Position
Unable to Move the Component to the Commanded Position
Incorrectly Adjusted or Aligned Component Detected
Actuator Operational but Driven Device not Operating
Component has an Unexpected Gas (or Liquid) Flow
Fluid Level too Low for Proper Operation
Validity Bit equal to 'invalid' or Post Processing Invalid
Corresponding Rolling Count Value being unproperly Updated
Message with an Incorrect Protection Calculation
Circuit Quantity Below a Specified Range
Circuit Quantity Above a Specified Range
Circuit Quantity Not Plausible given to Operating Conditions
Component Parameter Outside its Expected Range
Component Performance Outside its Expected Range
Component Operating in an Incorrect Way
Component Operation Prevented by an Obstruction
ISS odd transmission path - Electrical or signal failure
Gear shift mechanical failure odd transmission path
Gear shift mechanical failure even transmission path
Voltage level monitoring high power supply overvoltage
Voltage level monitoring high power supply undervoltage
Clutch 1 Actuator sensor - Electrical or signal failure
Clutch 2 Actuator sensor - Electrical or signal failure
Speed/Jump detection - ISS odd transmission path
Speed/Jump detection - ISS even transmission path
Voltage level monitoring ISS odd transmission path - Supply voltage
Voltage level monitoring ISS even transmission path - Supply voltage
Voltage level monitoring Pressure sensor 1 - Supply voltage
Voltage level monitoring Pressure sensor 2 - Supply voltage
Voltage level monitoring Pressure sensor 1 - Signal out of range
Voltage level monitoring Pressure sensor 2 - Signal out of range
Voltage level monitoring ISS even transmission path - Electrical or signal failure

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: applicationDataIdentification
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vbi_shdr_ctr_remain_est_if[1]
Data.Comment: Remaining available shifts for shift drum 2 actuator power stage

Data.Name: vbi_shdr_ctr_remain_est_if[0]
Data.Comment: Remaining available shifts for shift drum 1 actuator power stage

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Item.Text: entry condition fulfilled for TCU supplier and GETRAG boot
Getrag boot not compatible or valid
Customer boot not compatible or valid
Application SW not compatible or valid

Data.Name: auto park activation
Data.Comment: Relative to Auto Park Inhibition, the logic is inversed for activation (0=activated, 1 = inhibited)

Data.Name: VehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer order number for a kit (assembled parts bought as a whole for production e.g. cockpit), when the spare part number designates only the server (e.g. for aftersales).

The record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: vbi_shft_lev_park_plausi_status_if
Data.Comment: Plausibility status of P and NotP inputs of shift by wire lever

Data.Name: race start counter (Odometer) part 1.Race Start counter.odometer0
race start counter (Odometer) part 1.Race Start counter.odometer2
race start counter (Odometer) part 1.Race Start counter.odometer3
race start counter (Odometer) part 1.Race Start counter.odometer1
race start counter (Odometer) part 2.Race Start counter.odometer4
race start counter (Odometer) part 2.Race Start counter.odometer5
race start counter (Odometer) part 2.Race Start counter.odometer6
race start counter (Odometer) part 2.Race Start counter.odometer7
race start counter (Odometer) part 3.Race Start counter.odometer8
race start counter (Odometer) part 3.Race Start counter.odometer9
vbi_prndl_hamm_code_if
Data.Comment: Hamming code of shiftlever / buttonbox inputs

Data.Name: mechanical data.dsm_clu_enrgy_class_cnt_dat[12]
Data.Comment: number of clutch events within energy class

Data.Name: mechanical data.dsm_clu_enrgy_class_cnt_dat[6]
Data.Comment: number of clutch events within energy class

Data.Name: mechanical data.dsm_clu_enrgy_class_cnt_dat[13]
Data.Comment: number of clutch events within energy class

Data.Name: race start counter (Odometer) part 3.number of clutch events within power class 4
race start counter (Odometer) part 3.number of clutch events within power class 9

Race Start counter odo.race start counter (LowByte)

Data.Comment: counter for powerlaunches with full pedal (high byte)

Data.Name: race start counter.dsm_lch_race_cnt_dat_low
Data.Comment: counter for powerlaunches with full pedal (low byte)

Data.Name: race start counter.dsm_clu_temp_class_cnt_dat[4]
Data.Comment: number of clutch events within temperature class dsm_clu_temp_class_cnt_dat[4]

Data.Name: race start counter.dsm_clu_temp_class_cnt_dat[9]
Data.Comment: number of clutch events within temperature class dsm_clu_temp_class_cnt_dat[9]

Data.Name: race start counter.dsm_operating_temp_tcu_tim_dat[8]
Data.Comment: time of operation within specific TCU temperature range

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.Emission.relatedDTCs
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.extendedSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ECUReset.HardReset
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ECUReset.SoftReset
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: DataWrite.VIN
Request.Comment: Write VIN - Only available in reprog. session

Request.Name: DataRead.Race Start counter odo
Request.Comment: last 10 Race starts odometers are memorized

N button blocked in low position

button blocked in low position

Device.Name: I-Shifter stuck button detection for P button
Voltage level monitoring I-Shifter park LED

Label.Text: Mettre l'APC, moteur éteint, pied sur le frein
Ignition ON, Engine OFF, foot on brake
Mettre l'APC, moteur éteint et levier en position Park
Ignition ON, Engine OFF Shift lever position = Park
Moteur tournant, levier en position Neutre, pied sur le frein, frein à main serrer, Température d'huile boite comprise entre 20°C et 90°C
Engine running, shiflever position = Neutral, Foot on Brake, Hand brake activated, oil temperature between 20°C and 90°C
Faire l'apprentissage si Shift Motor 1 ou 2 =+/-252°
Apprentissage OK si levier en Park et Shiftleverposition=Park
Apprentissage OK si Shift Motor 1 ou 2 = +/-10°
Faire l'apprentissage si trop de glissement se fait sentir, ou creeping très faible

Send.RequestName: RoutineControl.Start reference TRS in shiftlever position P
RoutineControl.Results reference TRS in shiftlever position P

Display.RequestName: RoutineControl.Results reference TRS in shiftlever position P

Display.DataName: transmission range sensor park lock position
Display.RequestName: DataRead.transmission range sensor park lock position

Display.DataName: speed sensor input shaft 1 supply voltage
Display.RequestName: DataRead.speed sensor input shaft 1 supply voltage

Display.DataName: speed sensor input shaft 2 supply voltage
Display.RequestName: DataRead.speed sensor input shaft 2 supply voltage

Label.Text: V4 min contact in the rest = 2,674V
V6 defaut of CO or SC to +Vbat 4,5V
Shift paddle diagnosis short cut to ground
Shift paddle diagnosis short cut to battery
Shift paddle diagnosis out of range high
Shift paddle diagnosis out of range low
Engine running, shiflever position = Neutral, Foot on Brake, Hand brake activated, oil temperature between 20°C and 90°C
Moteur tournant, levier en position Neutre, pied sur le frein, frein à main serrer, Température d'huile boite comprise entre 20°C et 90°C
Faire l'apprentissage si trop de glissement se fait sentir, ou creeping très faible
Green Clutch status - only for EU6Dfull applications (VDiag $28 & $29)

Button.Text: Write Green Clutch values - NEW CLUTCH - DID $2228 - Value $01-
Write Green Clutch values - NEW ATCU - DID $2228 - Value $03 -

Label.Text: GTA screen is representative only for EU6Dfull applications
